title: bromopsis pumpelliana var. pellita
intro: Bromopsis pumpelliana var. pellita, also known as mountain sweet grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and to aid in wound healing. Mountain sweet grass can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
